rules.description: GNOME: Ctrl+<key> acts as ⌘+<key> in GUI apps (terminals keep Ctrl)
GNOME: terminal Ctrl+Shift shortcuts (C/V copy-paste, T/W tab, N window, F find)
GNOME: Ctrl+Click -> Cmd+Click (open link in new tab; right-click via real mouse button)
GNOME: Alt+Tab app switch, Alt+` cycles same-app windows
GNOME: tap Win/Super key opens Mission Control (overview)
